scene1_hook: Imagine a world where every cat has a loving home.
scene2_problem: But the harsh reality is that over 3 million cats are euthanized in shelters each year, simply because they don't have a family to love them.
scene3_stakes: If we don't act now, these innocent lives will be lost forever. The pain and loneliness are unbearable. We can do better.
scene4_solution: That's why we're dedicated to finding forever homes for cats in need. Your donation enables us to rescue, rehabilitate, and rehome more cats than ever before.
scene5_ask: Donate $25 today at welovecats.com and help give a loving home to a deserving cat. Together, we can make a difference.

rolling_credits.header: A Production of We Love Cats
lines: Produced by Doug Morse, AI Vocal Artist
